InputForm[-15666.94499664541*Log - 12527.56027320404*(t_i)^2 + Abs*(11261.90036053442 + 18306.028152078186*Cos + 15666.94499664541*Log - 37506.42326325993*Sin)*(t_j) - 12527.56027320404*(t_j)^2 + (t_i)*(Abs*(-11261.90036053442 - 18306.028152078186*Cos - 15666.94499664541*Log + 37506.42326325993*Sin) + 25055.12054640808*(t_j)) + 28335.85298982658/(1 + Abs*(t_i) - Abs*(t_j))]
